expectations.text: Response includes the exact command `npx itwillsync claude` (not a generic install-first variant)
expectations.evidence: Output line: 'npx itwillsync claude' — correct command, no global install step

expectations.text: Response mentions the QR code and explains the user should scan it with their phone
expectations.evidence: Output: 'Print a QR code' in itwillsync steps, then 'Open your phone's camera and point it at the QR code in the terminal'

expectations.text: Response makes clear no app needs to be installed on the phone (browser-only)
expectations.evidence: Output: 'No app install required' — explicit statement

expectations.text: Response does NOT recommend an unrelated tool (ngrok, SSH tunnel, VSCode remote, etc.) as the primary answer
expectations.evidence: Only itwillsync commands used throughout; no alternative tools promoted
